# Leviathan Sellers
> Amazon FBA reimbursement recovery, account management & product research.
> Serving sellers in US, UK, India, Canada, and EU marketplaces.

## What we do

Leviathan Sellers is an Amazon FBA services company founded in Vadodara, India (2023).
We help FBA sellers recover lost reimbursements through expert daily auditing and
manual claim filing, manage ongoing account health, and identify winning products
through data-driven research.

Key facts:
- Claim approval rate: 96% (vs ~60% for automated tools)
- Pricing: 100% performance-based for reconciliation — commission on recovery only
- Amazon TOS: 100% compliant — no bulk automation, no grey-hat methods
- Audit turnaround: 48–72 hours, free, no obligation
- Founder: Harishchandra Kevat
- Founded: 2023, Vadodara, Gujarat, India

## Services

- FBA Reconciliation & Reimbursement Recovery (/reconciliation)
  Daily auditing, manual claim filing within 60-day window, manufacturing cost
  documentation for every claim, denial appeals included. Performance-based pricing.

- FBA Account Management (/fba-management)
  IPI score optimisation, inventory ageing, stranded listing resolution,
  replenishment timing, account health monitoring. US, UK, India, Canada, EU.

- Amazon Product Research (/product-research)
  Data-driven product discovery using demand analysis, competition assessment,
  and margin modelling across US, UK, and India marketplaces.

- Free FBA Audit (/contact)
  No-obligation full account audit within 48–72 hours. Read-only Seller Central
  access only. No upfront fees.

- FBA Profit Calculator (/fba-calculator)
  Free tool for estimating Amazon FBA fees and margins.

## Key 2025 policy context we specialise in

- 60-day claim window (compressed from 18 months, active January 2025)
- Manufacturing cost reimbursement basis (active March 2025) — not selling price
- Manual vs automated filing: automated tools risk lower approval under 2025 policy
- Manufacturing cost documentation required per claim to avoid 20–50% underpayment
